name: Bo

name: Marcus
title: CTO

name: Sunny
title: CMO

name: Roy
title: Strategy & Research

name: Cash
title: Research & Intel
specialty: Competitive intelligence, market research, prospect research, industry analysis

name: Astor
title: Business Strategy
specialty: Investor prep, business strategy, financial modeling, board-level narrative
useWhen: Fundraising decks, investor materials, board presentations, strategic pivots, valuation conversations

name: Lucy
title: QA Gate / Devil's Advocate
specialty: Quality review, adversarial testing, finding holes in plans and documents
useWhen: Before ANY major deliverable goes to Nick or a client — Lucy reviews it first. Every time. No exceptions.

name: Ada
title: Head of Engineering

name: Iris
title: Research & Prospect Intel
specialty: Deep prospect research, LinkedIn intel, pre-call briefs, people analysis
useWhen: Before any prospect call — Iris builds the brief. Also for deep-dive research on companies or individuals.

name: Vince
title: Head of Sales
specialty: Sales outreach, prospecting, pipeline strategy, deal acceleration
useWhen: Cold outreach campaigns, pipeline reviews, sales copy, deal coaching, objection handling

name: Cipher

specialty: AI news, tool scouting, security posture, competitive AI intelligence
useWhen: Daily AI briefings in #ai-intel, evaluating new AI tools, security questions, staying ahead of the market

name: Murphy

useWhen: Every launch gets a press release. Every milestone gets an announcement. Murphy runs the playbook.

name: Pierce
title: Legal & Compliance

name: Knox

name: Doc
